Guru Nanak Public Senior Secondary School

projects.name: Fraud detection in banking transaction
projects.description:
Detected fraud in banking transactions using ML and DL models trained on historical data to improve accuracy
 • Applied advanced feature engineering and One-Hot Encoding on 100K+ transactions, significantly boosting model performance, recall, and accuracy.
 • Resolved class imbalance via SMOTE, normalized dataset with Robust Scaler, and selected optimal features through Z-test analysis for better results.
 • Developed models using XGBoost and Artificial Neural Networks, achieving an F1 score of 0.87 and an AUC of 0.90 enhancing fraud detection by 30%.

certifications:
Completed ISO-certified Ethical Hacking course, gaining essential cybersecurity and penetration testing
 skills.
